const test2 = () => 1

  console.log("Hello")
}

  console.log("Hello")
}

=== [R3] Refactor 1: "Toggle type annotation" ===

--- file:///.src/toggleLazyConst.ts ---
// refactor: 3:7-3:12, 5:7-5:12, 7:7-7:12

const test1 = 1

const test2 = () => 1

const test3: () => void = () => {
  console.log("Hello")
}
